title: [真。嚴正聲明] 香 港 人 對 政 府 發 出 最 後 通 牒

replies.msg:
香港人對政府發出最後通牒
＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊

就近日政府無能情況不斷惡化，香港人今日（八月五日）作出以下嚴正聲明：

修訂《逃犯條例》引發香港最嚴重之政治風波，惟政府毫無悔意，多次錯過解決風波的時機，終令示威活動遍地開花：

- 六月九日一百萬人上街遊行，政府表示條例「如期二讀」；
- 六月十六日二百萬人再上街，政府無意就六一二事件展開獨立調查；
- 七月一日香港人重奪議會，政府只顧凌晨開記者會譴責而無自我反省；
- 七月二十一日元朗發生恐襲，政府翌日才見記者，卻先譴責示威者侮辱中共國旗；

政府已多次犯下彌天大錯，且對黑警濫權及造反視若無睹，香港人已清楚指出，「We are saving Hong Kong, not playing」，政府無為程度已遠遠超越正常人的底線，香港人絕不能縱容，否則會將香港推向十分危險的情況。

對明天可能出現的示威活動，香港人向政府發出最後通牒，切勿與民為敵，亦不要再龜縮，直接且正面回應示威者五大訴求：

- 撤回《逃犯條例》修訂；
- 撤回所有示威暴動定性；
- 撤銷所有抗爭者控罪，不可秋後算帳；
- 成立獨立調查委員會，調查警察濫暴濫權、追究警察開槍責任及元朗警黑勾結；
- 全面落實雙普選。

香港人此時此刻於各區的示威，已展示人民對政府極度憤恨。這是一個關鍵的時刻，政府必須以香港整體利益為依歸，否則一切災難性後果將由政府承擔。

完
2019年8月5日（星期日）
香港時間0時55分

香港人對政府發出最後通牒
Hongkongers issues an ultimatum to the HKSARG
＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊＊

就近日政府無能情況不斷惡化，香港人今日（八月五日）作出以下嚴正聲明：
In response to the recent aggravated situation due to the Government’s incompetence, the people hereby announces the following today (Aug 5):

修訂《逃犯條例》引發香港最嚴重之政治風波，惟政府毫無悔意，多次錯過解決風波的時機，終令示威活動遍地開花：
The introduction of the Extradition Bill has wrecked by far the worst political havoc in Hong Kong. Unfortunately the Government insists on its stance nevertheless and has missed multiple opportunities to make good the situation, hence leading to the wide spread protests in recent weeks:

- 六月九日一百萬人上街遊行，政府表示條例「如期二讀」；
- 六月十六日二百萬人再上街，政府無意就六一二事件展開獨立調查；
- 七月一日香港人重奪議會，政府只顧凌晨開記者會譴責而無自我反省；
- 七月二十一日元朗發生恐襲，政府翌日才見記者，卻先譴責示威者侮辱中共國旗；

- On 9 June, 1 million citizens took to the street, but the Government announced its decision to forcefully proceed the Bill to the Second Reading;
- On 16 June, 2 million took to the street, but the Government rejected calls for an independent investigation in relation to the police violence on 12 June;
- On 1 July, Hongkongers expressed their dire concerns by seizing the Legco building, but the Government chose to speak to the press in the early morning, where they condemned the trespassers and expressed no self-reflection let alone answering to the people’s desperateness;
- On 21 July, a planned, violent triad attack occurred in Yuen Long against the protesters, but the Government this time did not speak out until the next day; at the governor’s opening speech, she showed no sympathy for the wounded and instead condemned the protesters for insulting PRC emblem.

政府已多次犯下彌天大錯，且對黑警濫權及造反視若無睹，香港人已清楚指出，「We are saving Hong Kong, not playing」，政府無為程度已遠遠超越正常人的底線，香港人絕不能縱容，否則會將香港推向十分危險的情況。
The wrongs committed by the Government, including the Police’s excessive violence and the their attempted upraising against the Government to invalid the Government’s leadership, and its incompetence, is far below the standard of a reasonable person. Hongkongers have made themselves clear - “We are saving Hong Kong, not playing”. The Hongkongers will not just let such bad things happen and see their homes succumb to the worsening situation.


has committed wrongs that are irreparable

對明天可能出現的示威活動，香港人向政府發出最後通牒，切勿與民為敵，亦不要再龜縮，直接且正面回應示威者五大訴求：
The Hongkongers hereby issue the following ultimatum to the Government. Stop standing against the people. Stop hiding. Respond directly to the 5 demands:

- 撤回《逃犯條例》修訂；
- 撤回所有示威暴動定性；
- 撤銷所有抗爭者控罪，不可秋後算帳；
- 成立獨立調查委員會，調查警察濫暴濫權、追究警察開槍責任及元朗警黑勾結；
- 全面落實雙普選。

- Withdrawal of the Extradition Bill;
- Revoking the categorisation of the protest(s) as “riot(s)”;
- Dropping all charges against the protesters;
- Setting up an independent investigation commission to investigate the excessive use of force by the police, the use of bullets and the liaison between the police and the traid
- Implementation of universal suffrage on district and legislative level.

香港人此時此刻於各區的示威，已展示人民對政府極度憤恨。這是一個關鍵的時刻，政府必須以香港整體利益為依歸，否則一切災難性後果將由政府承擔。
The protests that are occurring in multiple districts in Hong Kong show the utmost rage of the people against the regime. It is a critical moment. The Government must think for the benefit of its people. Otherwise, it shall be responsible for the turmoil that follows.

完
2019年8月5日（星期日）
香港時間0時55分

End
5 Aug 2019 (Sun)
0:55
